rules.noContractNoCode: NEVER write code without reading and understanding MODULE_CONTRACT first
rules.noDocsNoChanges: NEVER change code without reading current-status.xml, knowledge-graph.xml, development-plan.xml, verification-plan.xml
rules.noCommitWithoutVerification: NEVER commit without passing verification for the affected module
rules.noDirectXmlEdits: NEVER edit docs/*.xml without reading the full file first
rules.alwaysUpdateArtifacts: AFTER any code change: update MODULE_MAP, then knowledge-graph, then verification-plan if tests changed
rules.noSilentVerificationSkips: IF verification cannot run, state EXACTLY why — do not skip or imply coverage exists

executionPolicy.violation: Any deviation from these rules is an engineering protocol violation and must be flagged immediately
